name: English Pub Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry mustard, brown sugar, salt, and turmeric in a blender.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. With the machine running, add beer to the blender in a slow, steady stream.
4. Blend until the mixture is smooth and creamy, stopping occasionally to scrape down the sides of the bowl.
5. Transfer the mustard to a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
6. Store in a cool, dark place.
This easy-to-prepare mustard pairs well with sausage, cold cuts, cheese, bread, pickled onions, and radishes.
